name: Curried Chickpeas with Veggies
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Turnips, sliced into 1/4-inch thick pieces
3 ounces Broccoli, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the turnips and broccoli for 8 minutes until tender.
2. Combine the steamed vegetables with the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Serve warm.
